Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}He's destined for far greater heights than someone like myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}So, if you guys are here, that means you're serious about fighting Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I just pieced together what information Ikutsuki left behind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}'Course, a good chunk of it was just delusional nonsense. He was a real nut job.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh yeah, so he was your boss, huh? It was a big surprise findin' that out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}That said, we only really knew his name...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}He was just one of the researchers who created us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Heh, what's the point in telling you? It'll all be over soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}We don't have time for this. Step aside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}There's no way Nyx could be stopped by the likes of you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But I ain't about to let you get in Takaya's way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Do you even understand what you're saying!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}If we don't stop Nyx, all life will be destroyed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}We ain't gonna live much longer either way... So we gotta see it through to the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}This is Takaya's wish... So I'm not backin' down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Alright... I think that's enough talkin'.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Time to get serious... Let's do this.[n]{f 1 1}
